EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IEvaluatedNetworkAttribute

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of an evaluated attribute in a network dataset.

[Guid("AFB92F55-F7E1-4210-B44E-E118AC2D4D99")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IEvaluatedNetworkAttribute : INetworkAttribute

Properties

DENetworkDataset

Evaluator used to derive values from the given network source for this network attribute.

IDENetworkDataset DENetworkDataset { get; }

Property Value

IDENetworkDataset

Examples

Sample Snippet

<pre>IDENetworkDataset GetDataElementFromNetworkDataset(INetworkDataset networkDataset)<br>{
  IDatasetComponent datasetComponent = networkDataset as IDatasetComponent;
  return (datasetComponent.DataElement as IDENetworkDataset);
}</pre>

Remarks

<p>Access the DENetworkDataset for an existing&nbsp;<a href="INetworkDataset.htm">INetworkDataset</a>&nbsp;by calling <b><a href="javascript:Jump('esriGeoDatabase/IDatasetComponent_DataElement.htm')">IDatasetComponent::DataElement</a></b>.</p>

DataType 

esriNetworkAttributeDataType DataType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriNetworkAttributeDataType

DefaultEvaluator[esriNetworkElementType]

Evaluator used to derive attribute values for the given element type when an evaluator is not specified for a network element's source.

INetworkEvaluator DefaultEvaluator[esriNetworkElementType ElementType] { get; set; }

Parameters

ElementType esriNetworkElementType

Property Value

INetworkEvaluator

Examples

Sample Snippet

Evaluator[INetworkSource, esriNetworkEdgeDirection]

Evaluator used to derive values from the given network source for this network attribute.

INetworkEvaluator Evaluator[INetworkSource NetworkSource, esriNetworkEdgeDirection Direction] { get; set; }

Parameters

NetworkSource INetworkSource
Direction esriNetworkEdgeDirection

Property Value

INetworkEvaluator

Examples
